title: Radiant Syrian Garlic Bowl
description: A bright, umami-packed, keto-friendly bowl featuring roasted garlic, cauliflower rice, and fresh greens, served in a donabe.
instructions: Preheat a donabe over medium heat and melt the butter with the olive oil until foamy.
Add the whole garlic bulb and sauté until fragrant and lightly browned, about 2 minutes.
Stir in the cauliflower rice, coating it in the butter-garlic mixture, and cook, stirring, until the rice is tender and lightly toasted, about 4 minutes.
Remove the donabe from heat and let the mixture cool slightly, then transfer the cauliflower rice to a bowl.
In the same donabe, add the shredded romaine lettuce and cook for 1 minute, just until wilted, then transfer to the bowl.
Toss the lettuce with cherry tomatoes, pumpkin seeds, crumbled feta, parsley, lemon juice, salt, and pepper until evenly coated.
Spoon the mixture into a serving bowl, ensuring a layered presentation of garlic-infused rice and fresh greens.
Garnish with an extra sprinkle of feta and a drizzle of olive oil, and serve immediately.
